prompt: I want to convert this legacy model to IDFA compliance. Start the retrofit — but I want to validate at each step that the numbers don't change. Show me the first 3 formulas being converted.
assertions: Creates Named Ranges for input cells FIRST before rewriting any formulas (dependency ordering)
Proposes Named Range names following IDFA convention (Inp_ prefix for inputs)
Rewrites formulas ONE at a time, not all at once
Validates that outputs match the original values after each formula rewrite
Does NOT delete and rebuild the model from scratch — retrofits in place
Uses the idfa-ops create-range command to create Named Ranges programmatically
